top_story.headline: The Morning Intelligence Report is waiting for its first automated refresh.
top_story.summary: The scheduled GitHub workflow will collect fresh stories from the configured feeds and replace this setup message.
top_story.why_it_matters: This confirms the website can load report data before the first scheduled RSS run.
top_story.parker_read: The pipes are connected. Tomorrow morning is the first real water test.

tool.name: Make
tool.summary: A visual automation platform for connecting apps and routing data through multi-step workflows.
tool.best_for: Cross-platform workflows with visible data mapping
tool.verdict: Powerful once the scenario stops looking like an electrical diagram designed by an octopus.

uplifting.headline: A small machine is learning how to bring you the morning.
uplifting.summary: The first automated report will replace this message after the RSS workflow runs.
uplifting.why_it_matters: Useful systems begin as a few connected pieces and then quietly become part of daily life.
uplifting.parker_read: Tomorrow gets the confetti only after the machinery proves it can wake up on time.

capybara_message: The pipes are connected. Rest now. Tomorrow we see whether the little news machine remembers to make coffee.
